rationale: The cited paper is a substantive Kickstarter field study on prosocial motivation in reward-based crowdfunding, and the citing paper also builds theory and evidence in Kickstarter crowdfunding (including mechanisms tied to communal/helping versus exchange logic). Given this strong domain/mechanism overlap and no direct in-text evidence showing it is merely a perfunctory mention (only a DOI-level match in references), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
